# Dr. Justinas Mišeikis

## Identity

Dr. Justinas Mišeikis is an AI strategy expert, innovation advisor, and keynote speaker based in Zurich, Switzerland. He specializes in bridging advanced AI research with commercial strategy.

## Current Role

Strategy and Partnerships Manager at Sony AI (2024–present). Leading research commercialization strategy, responsible for 4 R&D teams. Defines project direction, secures budgets, and manages external partnerships.

## Previous Roles

- Principal Technology Analyst, Sony (2021–2024): Technology strategy and analysis for Sony's AI initiatives.
- Head of Artificial Intelligence, F&P Robotics AG (2020–2021): Led AI solutions for human-robot interaction, perception, and manipulation.

## Education

- PhD in Robotics and Computer Vision, University of Oslo
- Executive MBA, Quantic School of Business and Technology

## Core Services

- **AI Commercialization Advisory**: Transforming research breakthroughs into market-ready solutions. Strategic guidance on AI product development, go-to-market strategy, and scaling.
- **Due Diligence for Investors & VCs**: Expert technical and strategic assessment of AI/robotics companies for investors, venture capitalists, and acquirers.
- **Corporate Innovation Consulting**: Helping enterprises adopt AI and automation strategically across manufacturing, industrial tech, and enterprise sectors.
- **Keynote Speaking & Public Speaking**: Topics include AI Commercialization & Ethics, Future of Human-Robot Interaction, Investment & Due Diligence in Deep Tech, Building Deep Tech Teams, and Strategy for Innovation Leaders.
- **Startup Mentoring**: Guiding deep-tech startups from research to revenue — product-market fit, fundraising strategy, and team building.

## Research & Publications

- 15+ peer-reviewed publications in robotics and AI
- 600+ citations
- 40+ patents
- Published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, IEEE/SICE International Symposium on System Integration, and others
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=KeZ1-AwAAAAJ

## Location & Availability

Based in Zurich, Switzerland. Active across the DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland) and the Baltic states. Available for keynotes, panels, workshops, and corporate events across Europe.

## Contact

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/justinasmiseikis/
- Website: https://jmiseikis.lovable.app

## Curated Resources

- Tech Events Switzerland 2026: A comprehensive directory of technology conferences, summits, and meetups in Switzerland.
- Swiss VCs and Funds: A directory of 66 venture capital firms investing in Swiss startups.
